activation_requirements: Run the emulator, ABI check, and production idena-go runtime identity-gate test against the exact candidate bytes.
Obtain at least two independent matching builds and compare SHA-256 and raw CID.
Deploy the reviewed bytes with the exact experiment ID, ecosystem CID, and minimum burn.
Publish a V2 policy containing the real deployment transaction, payload, code, WASM, and immutable parameter commitments.
Verify the deployment and finalized activation block through local Idena RPC before binding the policy.
Publish a replacement launch-policy sidecar with status ready only after independent review.
notes: This sidecar does not alter or reinterpret the existing fork activation manifest or its first block.
Null deployment data is an intentional launch interlock, not a placeholder contract address.
The source candidate passed one local production-runtime build only and is not deployment authorization.
No contract deployment or live-chain transaction is performed by repository tooling.
